title: EssentialsX Discord Link
description: The Discord account linking module for EssentialsX. (requires main and Discord modules)
body:
**EssentialsX Discord Link** extends [EssentialsX Discord](https://modrinth.com/project/essentialsx-discord) with the ability to sync in-game groups with Discord roles! It includes the following features:
- Syncing Vault groups to Discord roles
- Syncing Discord roles to Vault groups (separately to the above)
- Optionally requiring a linked account to join the server
- Allowing unlinked players to join, but requiring a linked account to move or chat

For information on how to set up this module, see the [EssentialsX Discord Link tutorial](https://essentialsx.net/wiki/Discord-Link.html)!

You need a matching version of the [main EssentialsX module](https://modrinth.com/plugin/essentialsx) and the [EssentialsX Discord module](https://modrinth.com/project/essentialsx-discord) to use this addon module.
